title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BUCAY NATIONAL GENERAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUCAY, PROVINCE OF ABRA, TO CRISTINA B. GONZALES MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 8566

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7702, May 05, 1994 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BUCAY NATIONAL GENERAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUCAY, PROVINCE OF ABRA, TO CRISTINA B. GONZALES MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Bucay National General High School in the Municipality of Bucay, Province of Abra, is hereby changed to Cristina B. Gonzales Memorial High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

Lapsed into law on May 5, 1994 without the President's signature, pursuant to Sec. 27(1), Article VI of the Constitution.
